prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别约1014名、1008名、962名、1330名、1842名，2021–2023年稳定在1000名左右，2024年起明显后移，2025年较2023年后移约880名，近两年位次加速后移趋势显著；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为18人，2024年缩减至16人，2025年进一步缩减至14人；2026年计划大幅扩招至25人，较2025年增加11人，扩幅约78.6%，扩招将显著缓解竞争压力，推动位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院依托浙江大学（985/211/双一流），软科主榜排名第3，为国内顶尖医学院之一，临床医学学科评估A、药学A+、基础医学A-，学科实力极强，对高分考生有持续吸引力；浙江大学2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端与校园安全舆情，但作为顶尖医学院，负面舆情对报考热度影响有限；抖音热度排名第14（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度仍处高位；临床医学（A）、基础医学（A-）、药学（A+）均为顶尖水平，与招生专业临床医学（5+3一体化）、口腔医学（5+3一体化）高度对应，学科优势对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高热（2024年，推荐级别），口腔医学热度稳定（2024年，推荐级别）；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年增长约5.7%，竞争基数扩大；浙江大学医学院位于浙江省杭州市，与山东省同属华东地区，地域偏好较强；该校在山东省招生占比近年约4%–5%，属外省招生重点省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1842名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招78.6%带来的竞争缓解、山东省考生总数增长5.7%带来的竞争加剧、医学类专业持续高热以及学校顶尖学科实力，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约2680名，区间2358–3002名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（临床医学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 临床医学（儿科方向，5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2358–3002名内，建议以二档五年制临床医学为主攻方向，一档5+3一体化及巴德年班作为冲刺目标，三档儿科方向作为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（2358名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（3002名附近）建议以三档儿科方向为主，兼顾二档五年制临床医学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 1014, 1008, 962, 1330, and 1842 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized around 1000, but from 2024 onward, there was a clear backward shift. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 880 compared to 2023, showing a significant acceleration in the backward trend in recent two years. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 18 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 16 in 2024, and further reduced to 14 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 25 students, an increase of 11 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 78.6%. This expansion will significantly alleviate competition pressure and push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine relies on Zhejiang University (985/211/Double First-Class), ranked 3rd on the Soft Science main list. It is one of the top medical schools in China, with clinical medicine rated A, pharmacy A+, and basic medicine A-, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength and sustained appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety public opinion, but as a top medical school, negative public opinion has limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting that application attention remains high. Clinical medicine (A), basic medicine (A-), and pharmacy (A+) are all top-tier, closely corresponding to the enrollment majors of clinical medicine (5+3 integrated program) and stomatology (5+3 integrated program). The disciplinary advantages strongly attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine continues to be highly popular (2024, recommended level), and stomatology remains stable (2024, recommended level). In 2026, the total number of candidates in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to 2025, expanding the competition base. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, in the same East China region as Shandong, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Shandong Province has been about 4%–5% in recent years, making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1842, the significant expansion of enrollment plan by 78.6% in 2026 easing competition, the 5.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province intensifying competition, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the top disciplinary strength of the school, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift significantly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2680, with a range of 2358–3002.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Bardeen Medical Class) (Clinical Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Pediatrics Direction, 5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2358–3002, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 five-year clinical medicine as the main direction, with Tier 1 5+3 integrated programs and Bardeen class as sprint targets, and Tier 3 pediatrics direction as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2358), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 3002), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 3 pediatrics direction, while also considering Tier 2 five-year clinical medicine.
